title: Suitcase icon
excerpt: what does this suitcase icon in front of a board means

posts.cookedHtml: what does this suitcase icon in front of a board means

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Parul,

Is it possible to share a bigger screenshot for me? Additionally, can you confirm if you’re using a specific product? This will help us narrow down where and what this icon is

posts.author: Parul (Parul)
posts.cookedHtml:
Highlighted board icon.
I am using the Work Management Enterprise Plan. Hope this helps. Let me know if you need any additional details.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Parul,

Ah yes, thank you for the screenshot! This is an icon for our portfolio management template - it’s an icon to represent a portfolio symbol.

posts.author: Parul (Parul)
posts.cookedHtml:
Great. How can i get this on my account. I am unable to see this option as of now.

Note: Using an Enterprise Level plan
